nasb.text: When the accusers stood up, they began bringing charges against him not of such crimes as I was expecting,

esv.text: When the accusers stood up, they brought no charge in his case of such evils as I supposed.

cnv.text: 原告都站在那裡，他們所控訴他的，並不是我所意料的惡事。

ccb.text: 他们都站起来当面指控他，但所告的并非我料想的罪行，

csbs.text: 那些原告站起来围着他提出来的罪状，并不是我所认为的恶事。
